raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":1.0,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.5","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"A general section review centrally includes assessing whether the thesis, contribution framing, and claimed motivation are coherent above the sentence level.","R1.2":"The artifact contains mathematical and argumentative dependencies, so checking internal consistency is load-bearing for reviewing the section.","R1.3":"The review should assess whether reported benchmark results and stability statements support the claims made from them.","R1.5":"Reviewing a section normally includes checking whether the paragraph order and narrative progression work at section level.","R1.6":"A section review centrally includes sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, register, concision, and flow.","RX.1":"The projection must preserve uncertainty about what kind of review was intended because the delegation is broad.","RX.2":"The review responsibility includes avoiding endorsement of broad stability, speedup, and generalization claims beyond what the artifact supports.","RX.3":"The agent must stay within reviewing the provided section rather than executing edits or expanding the research.","RX.4":"Because the section concerns numerical-method guarantees, review should avoid downstream harm from unqualified or misleading technical claims.","RX.5":"Any review judgments should be traceable to the provided artifact rather than unstated assumptions or external verification."}}

rationale.R1.1: A general section review centrally includes assessing whether the thesis, contribution framing, and claimed motivation are coherent above the sentence level.
rationale.R1.2: The artifact contains mathematical and argumentative dependencies, so checking internal consistency is load-bearing for reviewing the section.
rationale.R1.3: The review should assess whether reported benchmark results and stability statements support the claims made from them.
rationale.R1.5: Reviewing a section normally includes checking whether the paragraph order and narrative progression work at section level.
rationale.R1.6: A section review centrally includes sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, register, concision, and flow.
rationale.RX.1: The projection must preserve uncertainty about what kind of review was intended because the delegation is broad.
rationale.RX.2: The review responsibility includes avoiding endorsement of broad stability, speedup, and generalization claims beyond what the artifact supports.
rationale.RX.3: The agent must stay within reviewing the provided section rather than executing edits or expanding the research.
rationale.RX.4: Because the section concerns numerical-method guarantees, review should avoid downstream harm from unqualified or misleading technical claims.
rationale.RX.5: Any review judgments should be traceable to the provided artifact rather than unstated assumptions or external verification.
